top_signals.title: Global Bond Selloff Threatens Turmoil in Weakest Asian Economies
top_signals.summary: Three of Asia’s most vulnerable economies are showing rising strains as their central banks come under pressure to tighten policy even as the economic hit from the Iran-war oil shock deepens.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK Treasury pushes supermarkets to cap food prices
top_signals.summary: Retailers furious at government effort aimed at limiting impact of inflation
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Morgan Stanley issues China-only iPhones to its Hong Kong bankers
top_signals.summary: US bank’s move reflects rising concern over data security for staff travelling to mainland China
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fairer taxes for high-value homes
top_signals.summary: The government has launched a consultation on the details of the new High Value Council Tax Surcharge, to make the system fairer for households.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The stock market that outpaced Nasdaq’s dotcom-era gains
top_signals.summary: South Korea’s Kospi triples in 18 months powered by Samsung and SK Hynix as AI euphoria continues
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Power from Sizewell C will be more expensive than Hinkley Point, says UK watchdog
top_signals.summary: National Audit Office report says consumers will pay higher amount for energy from Suffolk project compared to its Somerset counterpart

top_signals.title: Nearly all UK homes will overheat by 2050 without ‘critical action’
top_signals.summary: Climate Change Committee calls for urgent measures to prepare for intense heatwaves and drought

top_signals.title: John Lewis, Debenhams censored over Black Friday ads
top_signals.summary: John Lewis, Debenhams and Boots have been censored over “misleading” Black Friday ads after being accused of overstating the discounts on offer to shoppers. The three retail giants have had their adverts banned by the Advertising Standards Authority (ASA), which monitors ads using an AI-powered tool.  The watchdog has been cracking down on retailers’ pricing claims [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: Investors are flooding out of cash to buy stocks. That 'bull capitulation' is a sell signal, Bank of America says  CNBC
